title: TMR labeling of LRRK proteins

steps: Typical reaction volume is 40 µL . Add dye in 1:1 ratio to about 20 micromolar (µM), LRRK protein . This protocol was used for LRRK1 RCKW and LRRK2 RCKW but should apply to other similar proteins and constructs as well.

Remove excess dye by a buffer exchange through a Micro Bio-Spin P-6 desalting column (Bio-Rad). Make sure to equilibrate the column with the LRRK2 Storage buffer beforehand. Follow directions included with the column.
Repeat the exchange one more time to further remove the excess dye.
Quantify protein concentration and label efficiency using a NanoDrop or equivalent method.
creator: Mariusz Matyszewski
